

```{r}
d <- Sys.Date()
```

<!-- Uncomment when PhD starts -->

<!-- |  |  |
|:-----------------|-----------:|
| Barcelona School of Economics                      | [estebandegetau\@gmail.com](mailto:estebandegetau@gmail.com) |
| Ramon Trias Fargas, 25-27, Barcelona, 08005, Spain | [www.estebandegetau.com](https://www.estebandegetau.com)     |

: {tbl-colwidths=[60,40]} -->

|  |  |
|:-----------------|-----------:|
| World Bank   | [estebandegetau\@gmail.com](mailto:estebandegetau@gmail.com) |
| Mexico City, Mexico | [www.estebandegetau.com](https://www.estebandegetau.com)     |

: {tbl-colwidths=[60,40]}


## Education

{{< include education.qmd >}}

## Working Papers

{{< include ../research/working_papers.qmd >}}

## Select Work in Progress

{{< include ../research/work_in_progress.qmd >}}

## Work Experience

### Research

|  |  |
|:-------------------------------------------------|---------------------:|
| **World Bank** |  |
| Consultant - Macroeconomics and Growth, Development Research Group, practice to Agustín Samano | 2025 - 2026 |

|  |  |
|--------------------------------------------------|---------------------:|
| **ITAM** |  |
| Graduate Research Assistant - Center for Economic Research (CIE), practice to Joyce Sadka and Enrique Seira | 2022 - 2023 |

### Public Service

|                                                 |             |
|-------------------------------------------------|------------:|
| **Instituto Mexicano del Seguro Social (IMSS)** |             |
| Deputy Head, Fiscal Policy Planning - Affiliation and Collection Directorate             | 2023 - 2025 |

### Teaching

{{< include ../teaching/classes.qmd >}}

```{=html}
<!-- ### Industry Experience

|                         |      |
|-------------------------|-----:|
| **CEROMULTAS**          |      |
| Senior Business Analyst | 2021 |
| Business Analyst        | 2020 |

|                             |      |
|-----------------------------|-----:|
| **T-Rez Consulting**        |      |
| International Trade Analyst | 2018 | -->
```

## Recognitions

{{< include recognitions.qmd >}}

## Certifications

{{< include certifications.qmd >}}

## Technical Skills

{{< include skills.qmd >}}

Last updated: `r format(d, "%B, %Y")`
